full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated with: 9,7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, and RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 25 ml DMEM/F12+++. After RBC lysis and centrifugation, the final pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of media. For counting, a 1:10 dilution of the cell suspension was made.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

5 cryovials of 10E6 cells each were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker

Flow cytometry

Made 1 aliquot with 1.5 E6 cells for staining together with S516_pOme samples.

The aliquots were stained with the antibodies from the fibroblast panel according to the protocol.
